title: Anderssonskans Kalle
writer: Sölve Cederstrand, Emil Norlander, Sigurd Wallén
actors: Thor Modéen, Tollie Zellman, Hjördis Petterson
plot: Anderssonskans Kalle is the typical 'Söderkis'. It's a boy growing up on Söder in Stockholm and he is very fond of practical jokes. His mother sees him as a good natured boy but his victims, mostly the local policeman and two old ...
